Brief tornado on Interstate 70.

A brief tornado moved across an area SW of Dorrance. Damage was noted to three different homesteads, one of which was due to the inflow in to the storm. The majority of damage was to trees. However, a larger metal shed had collapsed and debris was strewn from a homestead and collected along the nearby metal fence.
